description: Workflow for processing pet data including setting availability status and adding supplementary data

transitions.description: Set availability status attribute on pet entity
transitions.end_state_description: Availability status has been set on pet entity

transitions.description: Add supplementary data attribute to pet entity
transitions.end_state_description: Supplementary data has been added to pet entity

transitions.start_state_description: Availability status has been set on pet entity
